quality.rationale: 需串联测地线方程、协变导数展开、克氏符定义与度规循环坐标条件完成多步推导；结构可广泛迁移至任意具有基林矢量的时空场景

origin.question: Problem 7.13. Suppose the coordinate $\mathbf{x}^1$ is a cyclic coordinate, i.e. the metric functions $\mathbf{g}_{\\alpha \\beta}$ are independent of $\mathbf{x}^1$ . If $\mathbf{p}$ is the momentum of an unaccelerated particle, show that the component $\mathbf{p}_1$ is constant along the particle world line.
origin.solution:
Solution 7.13. Let $\lambda$ be an affine parameter such that $p^{\alpha} = \mathrm{d}x^{\alpha} / \mathrm{d}\lambda$ ; then for geodesic motion of the particle
$$
0 = (\nabla_{\mathbf {p}} \mathbf {p}) \cdot \mathbf {e}_{1} = \mathbf {p}_{1; \alpha} \mathbf {p}^{\alpha} = \frac {\mathrm {d p_{1}}}{\mathrm {d} \lambda} - \mathbf {p}_{\sigma} \Gamma_{\alpha 1}^{\sigma} \mathbf {p}^{\alpha},
$$
and therefore
$$
\frac {\mathrm {d} \mathbf {p}_{1}}{\mathrm {d} \lambda} = \mathbf {p}^{\sigma} \mathbf {p}^{\alpha} \Gamma_{(\sigma \alpha) 1} = \mathbf {p}^{\sigma} \mathbf {p}^{\alpha} \frac {1}{2} \mathbf {g}_{\sigma \alpha , 1} = 0.
$$
